claim: BuildLang hello.bld type-checks under the built-in ci-review policy profile, emits a passed check receipt, declares only the Console effect for main, and observes the Console println capability.
scope: Local source-checkout demo only: C:\dev\public\pubscan\quantalang with buildc 1.0.6 from isolated Cargo target; this does not prove whole-language correctness, full compiler correctness, physical scientific validity, or Build Universe compilation.
decision_summary: The local buildc receipt and verification report agree on schema, compiler version 1.0.6, source digest, input graph digest, ci-review policy digest, passed status, declared Console effect, observed Console println capability, and empty diagnostics.
non_promotion: Does not claim BuildLang replaces Julia today.
